title: Building deals with a fixed product set
excerpt: Hi there - new to Monday.com. I want each deal in deals to be built from a list of products that I’ve created in a ‘products’ board. I want the value of the deal to be calculated based on the products that are included. …

posts.author: JamesUF (James Fulford)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - new to Monday.com. I want each deal in deals to be built from a list of products that I’ve created in a ‘products’ board. I want the value of the deal to be calculated based on the products that are included. Is there a video or tutorial where I can see how that’s done please?

posts.author: ChayaGutnick-Skive (/chayagutnick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi James,

You would use the connect boards feature. See if this helps Connect boards & mirror columns | monday.com tutorials - YouTube

posts.author: srom (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like to do this. I don’t understand why there isn’t a native feature to multi-select products a lead/customer is interested in, and to update the deal value based on the price of those products.
Since the OP’s post, is there still no way to do this?
